summary_markdown:
```markdown
## What this issue is about
This issue proposes the development of the Quanta Toolbar for Volto, a component that enhances user interaction with blocks in the Plone CMS. The Quanta Toolbar will enable better access to block settings and functionality.

## What needs to be done
We need to implement a new toolbar that modernizes the current interaction model with blocks, including features like moving and deleting them. The implementation is intended to be experimental initially, solidifying its use based on feedback and further adjustments.

## Helpful background
Currently, the tools for managing blocks in Volto are outdated. The Quanta Toolbar aims to resolve these limitations by offering a more versatile and user-friendly interface. It’s important to keep the CSS separate from SemanticUI to ensure future compatibility.

## Good first steps
1. Review the [Proof of Concept implementation](https://github.com/plone/volto/pull/3161) to understand the current progress.
2. Explore the provided mockups on Figma to visualize the desired outcome.
3. Familiarize yourself with the existing block management system in Volto.
4. If you're interested in contributing, reach out to [@sneridagh](https://github.com/sneridagh) for guidance and collaboration.
```
